channel.title: Links on Christian Mahnke
channel.description: Recent content in Links on Christian Mahnke

item.title: Partner
item.description: These partners have contributed to or otherwise promoted my projects General Freies Verlagshaus by Michel Graver Kulturmaps Göttingen by Michel Graver Art For my art specific projects (mainly Ric - an unknown artist) I would like to thank the following collectors, and recommend a visit to their websites. Barina’s Dezente Hinweise by Wolfgang Barina The Woman’s House by Gerbrand Caspers Mark Strong from Meibohm Fine Art The Linosaurus by Gerbrand Caspers Everyday culture Facebook: Kleiderbügelmuseum Etlaswind by Matthias Dülp Strukturwalzen.
